name: Gridium Building Energy Management API
what_it_does: Building energy management platform with API — enabling commercial real estate and facility management companies to analyze interval meter data, detect energy anomalies, optimize demand charges, forecast utility bills, and track sustainability metrics across building portfolios, with utility data aggregation and AI-driven energy savings recommendations.
use_cases: Analyzing building interval meter data via Gridium API for energy waste detection
Monitoring demand charge exposure via Gridium for commercial real estate cost reduction
Tracking portfolio energy performance via Gridium API for sustainability reporting
Forecasting utility bills via Gridium API for operating expense budgeting
Identifying HVAC anomalies via Gridium for building operations automation
not_for: Residential energy management (Gridium is commercial/industrial buildings only)
Utilities billing systems (Gridium is analytics, not billing platform)
Real-time grid pricing for energy trading (Gridium is building analytics, not trading)
best_when: A commercial real estate company or facility manager needs AI-driven energy analytics across a portfolio — where Gridium aggregates utility data, detects anomalies, and recommends demand charge reduction strategies.
avoid_when: You have residential properties, need utility billing infrastructure, or require real-time energy trading price feeds.

auth.notes: API key authentication via Authorization header. Enterprise partnership required for API access. No OAuth2. No public self-service API — partner integration agreement required. Energy data from utility connections — Green Button data standard supported. No webhooks documented.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise SaaS per-building pricing; API access via partnership agreement
pricing.notes: San Francisco company. Founded 2013. Raised $8M. Commercial real estate focus: REITs, property managers, corporate campuses. Customers: CBRE, JLL, Equity Office. Green Button API integration for utility data. 15-minute interval data analysis. Demand charge optimization algorithms. Portfolio-level dashboards. AI anomaly detection for HVAC, lighting. ESG/GRESB reporting support. Utility bill digitization. Building portfolio management. Not a consumer-facing product — B2B enterprise platform.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Enterprise-only API — not publicly documented. Partnership required. Green Button data integration. Commercial buildings focus. Limited public API documentation. Annual contract required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Building/meter reads idempotent by ID. Historical interval data reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent for same time ranges.
known_agent_gotchas: Enterprise-only API — not self-service; requires partnership agreement with Gridium
API documentation is not publicly accessible — only via enterprise contract
Green Button data standard used for utility integration — requires utility cooperation
US commercial buildings only — no residential or international coverage
Annual subscription model — not per-call pricing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. Enterprise partnership reduces unauthorized access risk. US data residency. Building energy data is commercially sensitive. Green Button data standard has privacy requirements. Enterprise agreement includes data handling terms.
